telco-api-product-required.description: Demo-safe metadata warning. APIM persists these values as API custom properties under additionalProperties. This rule remains visible in governance results but does not block lifecycle publish.
telco-api-product-required.message: API custom property api_product should be present.

telco-health-path-required.message: API custom property health_path should be present.

telco-business-owner-required.description: Every API must have a business owner.
